name: github
description: Official GitHub CLI (gh). Manage repos, PRs, issues, and workflows with OAuth browser login.
author: GitHub

args_schema.name: action
args_schema.description: Action to perform: 'login' for OAuth browser authentication, 'run' to execute a gh command.

args_schema.name: input
args_schema.description: The gh sub-command to run (only required if action is 'run').
